executives.name: Hernán Büchi Buc
executives.background: Mr. Büchi has been a director since 2017. He is a civil engineer and holds a degree from the Universidad de Chile and an MBA from Columbia University. He served as Chile's Minister of Finance from 1985 to 1989.
